required_preferences.fact: Avoids all group exercise classes and evening workouts; now does gentle stretching and short guided relaxation routines midday—prioritizing migraine-safe, solo activities

supersedes.fact: Never does high-intensity workouts; sticks exclusively to yoga or Pilates in the evenings

required_preferences.fact: No longer schedules weekly packaging and logistics management; pauses fulfillment-related tasks until the commercial kitchen reopens or a new workspace is secured

supersedes.fact: Allocates two hours each week to personally manage startup packaging and logistics tasks previously handled by her sister—chooses late Friday afternoons for these responsibilities

required_preferences.fact: Attends nightly in-person cognitive behavioral therapy and biofeedback sessions between 8-10pm, strictly prioritizing this clinic window over all other activities or events.
Prepares weekly meal plans and grocery lists for her parents, prioritizing nutritious, easy-to-cook dishes for her father’s recovery
Avoids dairy and processed sugar to minimize acne breakouts, but indulges in dark chocolate once a week
Spends Saturday mornings exploring local artisan markets; never shops at chain retail stores for leisure

persona: An early-stage entrepreneur launching a direct-to-consumer skincare brand
